page_content:
Tracks Language Track

Minimum six additional credits; minimum 36 credits total

Prerequisite: First year language (6-12 credits)

Six credits in Hebrew, Arabic, Greek, or other relevant language

beyond the ﬁrst year level

Note: Students who place directly into second year language or

above need only complete six credits of language. The number of prerequisite language credits varies by language
